title: Eternal Starlight
description: A dimension mod that adds the magical and mysterious starlight dimension.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b5fd13a601ae8013f11edb1131d2ad2dd16a80c.png) ### **A minecraft mod that adds the magical and mysterious starlight dimension.**
### **DO NOT USE WITH "FAST NOISE" MOD (IF YOUR ETERNAL STARLIGHT VERSION IS LOWER THAN OR IS 0.8.1)** **Pictures:**
![Starlight Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XvcfUGfB/images/366ac61b37f12b0b646ac0be205af51a748f624a.png)
![Permafrost Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XvcfUGfB/images/1ebaf7b69163f252a4198f7eb876035fec94c84e.png)
![Scarlet Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XvcfUGfB/images/3dbe50d7b62aee4a7b44880015831d295d10c537.png)
![Crystallized Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XvcfUGfB/images/1ae02b0df79edad8e5d81fe2eed0459e6d4e7b6f.png)
![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XvcfUGfB/images/2f96c1f878c875ca276c36458e346635bea54e43.png)
And more at [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight/gallery)!
**To start your journey:**
![Starlight Portal Ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41b9a0c9165f0b9a5f481842c592d0d8d8a5f4c.png)
Find the _Starlight Portal Ruins_ structure in the overworld and fight _The Gatekeeper_.
**Bosses:**
Find the bosses using the _Seeking Eye_, follow the instructions on the _Starlight Story_.
**Others:**
There are lots of interesting biomes, ingredients, mobs, tools and weapons for you to meet in the mod. Check out **_the gallery or the YouTube Showcase_** for some of them.
**YouTube Showcase:**
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pJ0KF6kRWy4](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pJ0KF6kRWy4)
**Q&A:**
Q: What should I do if I found a bug?
A: Go to GitHub Issues and open a new issue. Please post your _latest.log_. (_NOT crash-xxx.txt_) Would be great if you tell us how to reproduce the error. Thanks a lot.
Q: Can you port it to another version?
A: We will only support the latest Minecraft version. But we allow unofficial ports.
Q: Can I include the mod in my modpack?
A: Yes, of course. Just don't provide incorrect informations about the mod. (like claiming that you made the mod)
Q: Can I post the mod to another site?
A: Yes, check out the licence.
Q: Can I use the code from the mod in somewhere else?
A: Yes, check out the license.
Q: Can I use the assets from the mod in somewhere else? (textures, models, sounds)
A: No, unless you have explicit permission from us.
Q: Can I contribute to the mod?
A: Yes. You can create a pull request on GitHub. And your code would be under our license.
**Many Music Borrowed From:**

[https://www.hmix.net/](https://www.hmix.net/)
